summary: Highly praised performance with strong keyboard work; recording details are unclear
review: The reviewer rates this show a perfect five stars, highlighting the enjoyable piano and accordion work of Bruce Hornsby and praising Vince Welnick's keyboards, while noting a personal preference for Brent Mydland’s era. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one five‑star review focusing on musical aspects; no recording details, so rating is based mainly on the strong positive sentiment about the performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention any specifics about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce Hornsby’s piano and accordion work is praised (though the accordion was optional), Vince Welnick is described as ‘really great’ on keyboards.
